acceptedAmendments: multi-Agent and independently installed Skills remain observe-only until explicit reversible opt-in management
broad metadata discovery narrows into source-pinned review and reuse-before-authoring decisions
external Skills may supersede repository-authored Skills when comparative evidence supports the change
Hooks are optional adapter-specific chain nodes with off, auto, and on modes and no authority expansion
the narrow collaboration-control chain is nested inside a broader capability ecosystem that includes MCP, Plugins, Apps, services, project mechanisms, and accountable human authority
blockedActions: creating or initializing a Manager repository
implementing the Manager product or choosing a final technology stack
cross-repository writing to YIYUAN-MERIDIAN, resource-radar, bookmark, consumer-config, CALIBRATION, ASSETS, or live runtime state
enabling, replacing, or hardening a live Hook
executing, installing, or admitting a third-party capability
committing, pushing, publishing, releasing, or deploying
nextGate: owner separately accepts the MERIDIAN topology-impact package and its unresolved repository-name, visibility, implementation-stack, and cross-repository update decisions
